free_text: Cross sections for the photofission of 243Cm, 245Cm,
249Bk, and 249Cf isotopes in the energy range from
Stacks of Cm, Bk and Cf and U targets.
The photofission  cross  sections for 243Cm and 249Cf
and  for  249 Bk (5.5 - 10 MeV) were measured at the
bremsstrahlung beams of the SSC  RF  IPPE  microtron
with   energy   step   from   59  to  200  keV.  The
measurements were performed by relative method using
the  photofission  cross  section of 238U as a cross

Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
